dev.heading:
Web
Development
dev.summary: {webDevYears} years of coding applications and building for the web.
dev.description: From legacy server systems to modern web stacks. Now specializing in building statically generated sites and dynamic web applications. Found Astro, Svelte and SvelteKit in my search for the 'perfect' front end stack, and they have now become my go-to tools for any web project. In my experience, these frameworks are unbeatable in terms of productivity, performance, and ease of use; which translates to more satisfaction and fewer headaches in the long run--both for me and my clients.

arnis.heading:
Filipino
Martial Arts
arnis.summary: {fmaPracticeYears} years of practice in the art of Lapunti Arnis de Abanico.
arnis.description: Previously trained and dabbled in different forms of martial arts: Karate, Judo, Aikido, Tai Chi, Jeet Kune Do, Krav Maga and Wonwhado. Found the art that I will practice for life in Lapunti Arnis De Abanico. While taking inspiration from other fields and valuable lessons from other disciplines, I am now on a path which my Lapunti teachers themselves have embarked on. A path of reflection and discovery, of sharing the art with others, and towards finding my own Lapunti.
